steps.title: Identify the key example
steps.content: The dash introduces a marketing campaign as the concrete example of what “can play a big role” in a book's commercial success. A marketing campaign is fundamentally a publicity effort.

steps.title: Match the example to the blank
steps.content:
The blank needs to name what a marketing campaign is an example of — the thing that "can play a big role" in commercial success. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Originality: "originality can play a big role" — originality means being novel or creative, a quality of the book itself, not something a marketing campaign provides. ✗
  • Choice B — Publicity: "publicity can play a big role" — publicity means public promotion and attention, which is exactly what a well-executed marketing campaign generates. ✓
  • Choice C — Complexity: "complexity can play a big role" — complexity means having many intricate parts, a property of the book's content, not of a marketing campaign. ✗
  • Choice D — Practicality: "practicality can play a big role" — practicality means usefulness for everyday purposes, unrelated to what a marketing campaign does. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
